bull.b: The ~$15M private placement (with potential warrant proceeds) materially extends the company's operating runway into 2H 2027, reducing immediate financing pressure. The FDA's lack of comments on the protocol amendment and interim safety data lowers the structural regulatory risk of a clinical hold. This validation of Auxora's safety profile across indications helps preserve trial continuity, supports discussions on pivotal program design, and strengthens the platform's de-risking

Reported zero total debt in the trailing twelve months reduces interest burden and financial leverage, improving operational flexibility. Lower leverage enhances the firm's ability to allocate capital toward R&D and trials, and reduces bankruptcy/default risk during multi-year clinical development cycles.
